# Peanut Butter Banana Smoothie

A quick breakfast smoothie with natural sweetness.

Tags: breakfast, smoothie, quick
Serves: 2 servings

## Ingredients

- 2 bananas
- 200ml milk
- 2 tbsp peanut butter
- 1 tbsp honey

## Method

1. Peel the bananas and break into chunks.

2. Add all ingredients to a blender.

3. Blend until smooth and creamy.
